agent: PRN Negeri Sembilan 2026 Sentiment Analysis Agent (cron)
election_milestone: CAMPAIGN PERIOD DAY 2 MIDDAY (Nomination Day 18 Jul 2026 closed; Day-2 19 Jul ~11:48 MYT second-cycle collection / 034922). Polling 1 Aug 2026; early voting 28 Jul; BN manifesto 24 Jul (DUN Linggi).

priority_directive.pir06_critical: Flag sharp sentiment shifts (>30% change) for any PIR-06 entity. Alert CRITICAL if Bersatu sentiment turns sharply negative (internal-fracture signal).
priority_directive.pir07_critical: Flag any seat where incumbent/leading candidate sentiment drops >20%. Alert PRIORITY if defector-framing sentiment intensifies at N.14. Monitor 'fleeing Sikamat' narrative impact on Aminuddin.
priority_directive.pir16_critical: Flag any narrative showing rapid viral amplification (>50% volume increase). Alert PRIORITY if 'Aminuddin fled Sikamat' frame gains negative traction. Monitor 'majoriti mudah' vs 'not taking for granted'.

trends.overall_rev9: PH-FAVORABLE TILT HOLDS; PIR-06 CRITICAL FLAG CARRIED (viral-amplification reinforcement via 'imminent?' SNAPSHOT, not new escalation); NEW PIR-16 PRIORITY ALERT (ESC-016) — Melaka PH-BN fracture RAPID VIRAL AMPLIFICATION (+600% source count vs rev8). The 034922 cycle is the SECOND Day-2 cycle (+2h28m since 011915). The dominant developments are TWO PIR-16 narrative events: (1) Melaka PH-BN fracture multi-source dominant narrative (Malay Mail + FMT + Star + Bernama + KLSE Screener + TMI + Star Perak containment) — escalates from rev8's Utusan-rencana opinion sub-thread to fully multi-source dominant; key structural nuances: DAP-only (Amanah retained), Anwar 'not briefed', Anwar urges postpone, Melaka CM rebuke, Perak containment (Saarani); NEW negative 0.42. (2) 'Bersatu exit from PN imminent?' mkini SNAPSHOT rhetorical-question headline — most explicit 'imminent' mainstream framing to date (paywalled body); NEW negative 0.42. Day-2 midday also adds PIR-07 Day-1 campaign-ops coverage (FIRST Day-1 walkabout for a T1 marquee candidate — Utusan Loke at Pasar Besar Seremban + traffic-compliance message, NEW positive 0.55; Kosmo Day-1 conduct oversight — 1 verbal dispute, 19 ceramah permits approved, Alzafny authoritative, NEW neutral 0.50). PIR-16 narrative discipline: Tok Mat 'keep adat out of polls campaign' (heavyweight-BN institutional-defense pushback, NEW positive 0.60) REVERSES the rev8 adat-controversy counter-signal on Aminuddin (revised 0.61→0.62, +1.64%, returns to rev7 level). PIR-16 BN-PN containment: Hadi 'friendship, brotherhood' (NEW neutral 0.55) + Wee 'continued development under strong and stable state government' (NEW neutral 0.52) extend the rev6 multi-leader containment to PAS-President and MCA-President. NO formal PN-MT removal notice and NO formal Bersatu withdrawal notice — formal_removal_notice_detected=false across now 7 consecutive passes since 170837 (182751/194028/205755/220325/231029/011915/034922). No entity exceeds the 30% numeric shift threshold (largest: Aminuddin +1.64%). No direction flips. NO NEW critical qualitative shift — the PIR-06 CRITICAL flag carries forward from rev5 (escalation was rev4→rev5; rev5→rev6 consolidation; rev6→rev7 corroboration/enrichment; rev7→rev8 operational-split reinforcement; rev8→rev9 viral-amplification reinforcement via 'imminent?' SNAPSHOT, no new escalation tier). Trigger #2 unchanged (reachable via EITHER path, not fired). No Bersatu candidate withdrawals reported this cycle. The PIR-16 PRIORITY alert (ESC-016) is NEW this revision. The 'Aminuddin fled Sikamat' frame has NOT gained negative traction (Tok Mat adat-pushback is counter-trend).
trends.pir06_trend: VIRAL-AMPLIFICATION REINFORCED at the consolidated tier (no new escalation). Progression: 15:09 'could face termination' → 16:33 'info chief floats termination' → 19:19 'has grounds to remove' (Kiandee, NST) → 22:20 SENIOR-FIGURE PUBLIC ADVOCACY (Kiandee full Utusan body, 'asas kukuh') [rev4] → 01:08 MYT 19 Jul PRINCIPAL-LEVEL EXIT SIGNALING (Muhyiddin 'Goodbye PN?'; Annuar Musa 'part ways'; PAS 'rift widens'; Hadi 'blames Bersatu'; mainstream 'imminent?') [rev5] → 05:04 MYT 19 Jul CONSOLIDATION (KINIGUIDE 'shifting alliances' master-narrative; Muhyiddin 'sole true opposition' + 'new bloc after NS polls'; BN-PN scope-expansion Melaka/PRU16; Muhyiddin graft-trial surfacing) [rev6] → 07:10 MYT 19 Jul CORROBORATION/ENRICHMENT (NST 'Bersatu at a crossroads' analytical frame; empirical 7 Bersatu-vs-PN ballot clashes + own-logo 24 seats; 5-hot-seats battleground mapping) [rev7] → 09:19 MYT 19 Jul OPERATIONAL-SPLIT REINFORCEMENT (Kosmo 'keluar daripada konsensus PN negeri' + 'memecah undi' — strongest operational-split confirmation to date; Bersatu 0.74 UNCHANGED, reinforced at the empirical-split tier; NO new principal statement; NO formal notice) [rev8] → 11:48 MYT 19 Jul VIRAL-AMPLIFICATION REINFORCEMENT (mkini SNAPSHOT 'Bersatu exit from PN imminent?' — most explicit 'imminent' mainstream framing to date; rhetorical-question headline; paywalled body; Bersatu 0.74 UNCHANGED, reinforced at the viral-amplification tier; NO new principal statement; NO formal notice) [rev9]. THREE-SIDED fracture unchanged and now viral-amplification-reinforced at the strongest-confirmation tier. NO formal notice of either type across 7 consecutive passes since 170837. Trajectory UNCHANGED: most likely Bersatu voluntary realignment AFTER Aug 1 poll; PN-MT removal remains possible. Trigger #2 unchanged (reachable via EITHER path, not fired).
trends.pir16_trend: NEW PIR-16 PRIORITY ALERT (ESC-016). Two rapid viral amplification events: (1) Melaka PH-BN fracture multi-source dominant narrative (+600% source count vs rev8: 1 source → 7+ independent sources — Malay Mail + FMT + Star + Bernama + KLSE Screener + TMI + Star Perak containment) — most significant PIR-16 narrative event of the cycle, escalates from rev8's Utusan-rencana opinion-piece sub-thread to fully multi-source dominant; key structural nuances: DAP-only (Amanah retained), Anwar 'not briefed', Anwar urges postpone, Melaka CM rebuke, Perak containment (Saarani). (2) 'Bersatu exit from PN imminent?' mkini SNAPSHOT — most explicit 'imminent' mainstream framing to date (rhetorical-question headline, paywalled body, PIR-06+16 overlap). TWO counter-trend PIR-16 narrative-discipline data: (a) Tok Mat 'keep adat out of polls campaign' (heavyweight-BN institutional-defense pushback — POSITIVE counter-trend to the adat-politicization framing, revises Aminuddin UP +1.64%); (b) Hadi 'friendship, brotherhood' + Wee 'BN-PN pact not a merger' (extend the rev6 multi-leader BN-PN containment to PAS-President and MCA-President). The 'Aminuddin fled Sikamat' frame has NOT gained negative traction (the seat-move was framed as 'pindah kawasan' in rev8, not 'fled'; the adat-politicization frame is being pushed back by Tok Mat). BN 'majoriti mudah' confidence claim: no Day-2 poll/forecast corroboration. PH 'not taking for granted' defence: not explicitly captured this cycle.
trends.pir07_trend: Day-2 midday ENRICHMENT. The FIRST Day-1 campaign-ops coverage for a T1 marquee candidate — partially fulfilling the rev7/rev8 next-cycle recommendation: Utusan 'Berkempen jangan langgar peraturan jalan raya - Anthony Loke' (full text, 11:32 MYT) — Loke led PH candidates on a Day-1 walkabout at Pasar Besar Seremban + urges traffic-rule compliance (no motorcycle-without-helmet convoys, no standing on 4x4). Day-1 momentum for Loke/DAP — counter-pressure for the rev8 'DAP paling tertekan' rencana pressure framing. SECOND PIR-07 datum: Kosmo 'Polis terima satu laporan gaduh mulut' (full text, 10:54 MYT) — Day-1 campaign conduct oversight (1 verbal dispute, no investigation opened; 19 ceramah permits approved; Datuk Alzafny Ahmad authoritative voice). Day-1 conduct picture is calm. THIRD PIR-07 datum: Aminuddin revised 0.61→0.62 (+1.64%) on Tok Mat's 'keep adat out of polls campaign' heavyweight-BN counter-pushback (reverses the rev8 -1.64% nudge; returns to rev7 level). The 5 hot seats (Linggi/Sikamat/Ampangan/Paroi/Labu) and 7 Bersatu-vs-PN clash seats (Sikamat/Ampangan/Paroi/Labu + 3 pending) hold from rev8. No new Day-2 campaign EVENTS (walkabouts, ops-centre openings) for the OTHER T1 marquee seats — only Loke/Chennah captured. 25 of 36 seats multi-cornered (69%); exact structure 11/21/2/2; 2 five-cornered (N.10 Nilai, N.33 Sri Tanjung) — trigger #7 WATCH. BN manifesto launch 24 Jul (DUN Linggi).

The DAP/Loke Day-1 walkabout is partial counter-pressure for the rev8 'DAP paling tertekan' rencana; the Melaka PH-BN fracture adds a fresh 'DAP coalition-intolerant' frame that needs to be tracked.

PIR-06.critical_flag_status: ACTIVE / CARRIED from rev5 (via rev6, rev7, rev8). PIR-06.assessment: VIRAL-AMPLIFICATION REINFORCED at the consolidated tier (no new escalation). The 034922 Day-2 midday cycle adds the most explicit 'imminent' mainstream framing to date: mkini SNAPSHOT 'Bersatu exit from PN imminent?' (rhetorical-question headline, 18:00 MYT 18 Jul pubdate, paywalled body). The 'imminent?' framing goes beyond rev8's 'keluar daripada konsensus PN negeri' operational-split confirmation to a viral-amplification tier where the imminence question itself becomes the news. This REINFORCES (does NOT escalate) the existing PIR-06 assessment (Bersatu 0.74, ESC-011 0.80, ESC-014 0.82) — no formal notice, no new principal statement, no candidate withdrawal. NO formal PN Supreme Council (Majlis Tertinggi) removal notice and NO formal Bersatu withdrawal notice have issued — formal_removal_notice_detected=false across now 7 consecutive passes since 170837 (182751/194028/205755/220325/231029/011915/034922). No Bersatu candidate withdrawals reported (collection_metadata tier4_seat_watch). Trajectory per collection_metadata UNCHANGED — most likely near-term outcome Bersatu voluntary realignment/exiting AFTER the Aug 1 poll; a reactive PN-MT removal notice remains possible if Bersatu candidates actively damage PN partners in the 7 confirmed direct-clash seats. Maximally favourable to PH.

PIR-16.rapid_viral_amplification_evidence: Melaka PH-BN fracture (DAP withdrawal from state government) went from 1 source in rev8 (Utusan rencana opinion sub-thread) to 7+ independent sources in rev9 (Malay Mail + FMT + Star + Bernama + KLSE Screener + TMI + Star Perak containment) = +600% source count. Meets the PIR-16 criterion ('>50% volume increase').
PIR-16.aminuddin_fled_sikamat_frame: NOT DETECTED. No explicit 'fled Sikamat' framing in the 034922 cycle content. The Utusan rencana (rev8) framed the seat-move as 'pindah kawasan' (move constituencies) LINKED to the adat-controversy — not 'fled'. The rev9 cycle adds Tok Mat's 'keep adat out of polls campaign' pushback (heavyweight-BN institutional-defense) — a COUNTER-TREND to the adat-politicization framing. NO PRIORITY alert on this specific criterion.
PIR-16.assessment: PIR-16 PRIORITY ALERT NEW this revision. The dominant development is the Melaka PH-BN fracture multi-source dominant narrative — RAPID VIRAL AMPLIFICATION (>50% volume increase per directive): 1 source in rev8 (Utusan rencana opinion sub-thread) → 7+ independent sources in rev9 (Malay Mail + FMT + Star + Bernama + KLSE Screener + TMI + Star Perak containment) = +600% source count. The Melaka event (4 DAP ADUN + 1 Amanah ADUN withdrew support from the BN state government over the appointed-reps Bill) is now a fully multi-source dominant narrative. Key structural nuances: (1) Amanah retained (TMI); (2) Anwar distances (Star: 'not briefed'); (3) Anwar seeks to contain (Star: 'urges postpone'); (4) BN-side rebuke (Star: 'Melaka CM: abrupt exit shuts door on negotiations'); (5) Perak containment (Star: Saarani). The narrative is negative for the BN-PH state-government-coalition model (coalition-cohesion failure), negative for DAP (fresh 'DAP quits state govt' frame attached entering NS PRN), and introduces a Madani-government coalition-management weakness (Anwar 'not briefed'). SECOND PIR-16 viral-amplification datum: mkini SNAPSHOT 'Bersatu exit from PN imminent?' — most explicit 'imminent' mainstream framing to date (rhetorical-question headline, paywalled body). The 'imminent?' framing is a PIR-06+16 overlap signal — reinforces (does NOT escalate) the existing PIR-06 motion. THIRD PIR-16 datum: Tok Mat 'keep adat out of polls campaign' (heavyweight-BN institutional-defense pushback on politicizing the adat issue) — a PIR-16 narrative-discipline datum (POSITIVE counter-trend to the adat-politicization framing) that revises Aminuddin UP 0.61→0.62 (+1.64%). FOURTH PIR-16 datum: Hadi 'BN-PN friendship, brotherhood' containment + Wee 'BN-PN pact not a merger, MCA principles intact' — extend the rev6 multi-leader containment to PAS-President and MCA-President. The 'Aminuddin fled Sikamat' frame has NOT gained negative traction.
